notes: Country-level VIZA RAG seed for singapore. This file is the source of truth for this country's visitor/tourism visa knowledge and is designed to evolve alongside the country-specific form-filling workflow.

chunks.title: 中国护照新加坡短期旅游签证建议
chunks.content: 中国护照持有人短期赴新加坡旅游通常需要先检查 ICA 的 entry visa requirement，并在入境前完成 SG Arrival Card。VIZA AI 应区分三件事：entry visa 是入境前许可，SG Arrival Card 不是签证，最终停留期由入境时签发的 electronic Visit Pass/e-Pass 决定。不要把新加坡路线误判成申根签证、马来西亚 eVISA 或美国 B1/B2。

chunks.title: Singapore entry visa is not an immigration pass
chunks.content: ICA explains that a Singapore entry visa is not an immigration pass; it is pre-entry permission to travel to and seek entry into Singapore. Possessing a valid visa does not guarantee entry, and ICA officers decide whether to grant an immigration pass at the checkpoint. The period of stay is not tied to visa validity and is shown on the digital e-Pass sent by email after entry.

chunks.title: SG Arrival Card timing
chunks.content: ICA requires travellers to submit the SG Arrival Card with electronic health declaration within 3 days before arriving in Singapore, including the day of arrival. VIZA AI should tell users to use official ICA/e-service channels and avoid paid lookalike SGAC websites where possible. SGAC does not replace a visa for visa-required passport holders.

documents.title: Singapore SG Arrival Card Intake Requirements

chunks.title: Singapore application channel and form scope
chunks.content: Use ICA SG Arrival Card e-Service or MyICA Mobile for the SGAC workflow. This RAG chunk is for SG Arrival Card traveller declaration intake and form-filling preparation only; route Singapore entry visa, SAVE/Form 14A, work, study, residence, immigration, journalism or other regulated purposes to a separate country workflow.

chunks.title: Singapore fields to collect before filling the form
chunks.content: Singapore SG Arrival Card intake should collect traveller identity, passport details, nationality/citizenship, sex, date/place of birth, place of residence, email/mobile contact, arrival/departure dates, last and next city/port, purpose of travel, mode and transport number, accommodation type/details, and electronic health declaration answers.

chunks.title: Singapore supporting documents and review checklist
chunks.content: Workflow guardrails: SG Arrival Card is not a visa, does not replace any visa requirement for visa-required travellers, and is normally submitted within the ICA timing window before arrival. VIZA should keep SGAC separate from Singapore entry visa/Form 14A and surface the ICA submission result when the backend runner succeeds.

chunks.title: Standard passport identity-field answer rules
chunks.content: Standard-answer identity fields must be answered from the applicant's passport biodata page, MRZ, official identity document, or the official dropdown options. This applies to passport number, name, date of birth, sex, nationality, issuing country, issue date, expiry date, issuing authority, place of issue, and passport/document type. For issuing authority or place-of-issue questions, do not infer the answer from the pickup city, residence city, application country, or travel destination; copy the exact Authority / Issuing authority / Place of issue wording printed on the passport if present. For Chinese ordinary passports, newer valid passports may show National Immigration Administration, PRC / 中华人民共和国国家移民管理局; older valid passports may show MPS Exit & Entry Administration / 公安部出入境管理局. If the passport prints a different authority, use the passport text. For passport type, select Ordinary / Regular / Normal only for ordinary personal passports; select Diplomatic, Official, Service, Special, Travel document, Refugee, or Other only when the document explicitly indicates that type. Official sources reviewed for this standard field rule include China National Immigration Administration certificate-issuing-authority notices and the Passport Law of the People's Republic of China; the passport biodata page remains the final source for the applicant's individual answer.

chunks.title: Official-source field answer norms
chunks.content:
Official-source field answer norms for singapore.
Use these norms only as filling guidance; if a live official form, passport, or uploaded document shows a more specific value, that document controls the answer.

Crawled source URLs: https://www.ica.gov.sg/enter-transit-depart/entering-singapore/sg-arrival-card

Passport and identity fields:
- You will need to submit your SGAC before arriving in Singapore and present your travel document to the ICA officer at the immigration counter.

Travel plan and port fields:
- ICA | SG Arrival Card (SGAC) with Electronic Health Declaration
- SG Arrival Card (SGAC) with Electronic Health Declaration
- Submit the SG Arrival Card (SGAC) with Electronic Health Declaration

Accommodation, host, and address fields:
- You will receive an acknowledgement email sent to the email address declared in your SGAC upon successful submission.

Answering rule: for closed-list fields, prefer the exact official option label/value. For document-backed fields, copy the passport, official identity document, application account, itinerary, invitation, accommodation, insurance, funds, or uploaded support document rather than guessing from a city, country, or prior answer.
